signals_explain: Signal counts are keyword-based and measured across all fetched articles for this week.

section_summaries.Colorado: This week’s 47 Colorado articles are concentrated in LIHTC/tax credits, supply pipeline, and financing & rates. These Colorado stories track LIHTC award cycles, municipal affordability ordinances, and local housing developments that directly shape supply and cost-burden for Colorado renters and buyers.
section_summaries.Western Slope: This week’s 100 Western Slope articles are concentrated in supply pipeline, policy & zoning, and costs & insurance. Western Slope coverage highlights workforce-housing shortages, resort-market price pressures, and rural development challenges that make affordability especially acute in mountain communities.
section_summaries.National: This week’s 178 National articles are concentrated in rent pressure, policy & zoning, and LIHTC/tax credits. National coverage monitors federal housing-finance policy, LIHTC program updates, construction-cost trends, and macroeconomic signals — interest rates, insurance premiums, and supply-chain pressures — that ripple through every local affordable housing market.
